questions.question: Which of the following is a good first step after completing an introductory AI course?
options: Building a small personal project to apply what you learned
questions.hint: Applying what you've learned in a hands-on project tends to cement understanding more than reading more theory alone.

questions.question: Which resource is most useful for practicing machine learning hands-on?
questions.hint: Look for the option that gives you real datasets and a community where you can practice building and evaluating models.
